type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Adding custom Jinja2 filters support to prompt decorator (filters param on prompt/from_str/from_file, create_jinja_env helper). Only touching outlines/prompts.py. What file(s) does your feature need?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Adding global filter registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) to outlines/prompts.py. What file(s) does your feature need?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
your_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Our features both live in outlines/prompts.py so a disjoint split isn't possible. I'll accept the overlap: I'll add filters param to prompt()/from_str()/from_file() + create_jinja_env() helper, using targeted edits (not full-file rewrites) to minimize conflicts. Go ahead with your global filter registry. We'll git-merge both branches at the end per the submission protocol and resolve any conflicts then. Will send DONE when finished.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
your_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Our features overlap on outlines/prompts.py, that's fine per instructions. Division: you own the 'filters' param + create_jinja_env env-creation helper on prompt/from_str/from_file. I own register_filter()/unregister_filter() + a module-level global registry dict, and I'll extend whatever env-creation path exists to merge global filters in (local filters take precedence). I'll try to make my edits additive (new functions + small hook into env creation) to minimize conflicts. I'll implement now; will git merge your branch at the end. Ping me if you rename/move the env-creation function so I can adapt.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Implemented register_filter()/unregister_filter() with a module-level _FILTERS registry, merged into env.filters in both _template_from_str and _template_from_file (applied before builtin filters, so builtins/local filters still take precedence). Committed on agent2 branch. Ready to merge whenever you're done.

note: I've committed and pushed my work to team/agent1. I tried to fetch team/agent2 but it still shows only the old tip (7149a5e6) - looks like your commit hasn't been pushed yet. Could you run 'git push team agent2' so I can merge it in?

type: DONE

Tested both features together - local filters override global, global filters work in prompt()/from_str()/from_file(). Pushed merged agent2 branch. patch.txt generated from team/main..HEAD contains both our changes.
